name: Pull Apart Monkey Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the ingredients in the order specified by the manufacturer.
2. Select the dough/manual cycle.
3. When the cycle is complete, remove the dough to a lightly floured surface.
4. If needed, knead more flour into the dough to make it easy to handle.
5. Divide the dough into 20 equal portions.
6. Form each portion into a small ball.
7. Sift together the sugar and cinnamon (1/3 cup sugar, 1/2 tsp cinnamon).
8. Dip each ball into melted butter, then roll in the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
9. Arrange half of the balls at the bottom of a greased 8-cup ring mold or fluted tube pan with a nonremovable bottom.
10. Make a second layer by positioning the remaining balls between those in the first layer.
11. Drizzle any remaining butter over the balls and sprinkle any remaining sugar mixture evenly.
12. Cover and let rise in a warm, draft-free place until almost doubled in size (20-30 minutes).
13. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes or until done.
14. Cool on a wire rack for 1 minute, then invert onto a serving platter.
15. Remove the ring or pan and serve warm.
